description: The chart only displays two data points (Q1 2023 and Q2 2023) yet retains the title claiming coverage from 2023–2026, creating a false impression that the slight downward trend seen represents a meaningful long-term pattern. With just two quarters of data, any apparent trend is statistically meaningless and misleads readers into drawing broad conclusions about multi-year sales behavior. The vast majority of the actual data — including significant growth visible in later years — is completely hidden.
